title: Beyondthestars.jar
description: A strange goop has fallen into your world, corrupting the surface and the caves.
body:
**WARNING! THIS MOD CAN APPEAR IN MODS WITH CUSTOM DIMENSIONS THAT CONTAIN STONE.**
**THIS MOD ALSO NEEDS [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/HVdLnQMI) FOR THE ENTITIES TO WORK!**

Your world has been infected by a goop from outer space, _it's somehow edible..._

It breathes, it glows, it infected the surface and the caves.

There are currently two entities in this mod, Dranglers and Dripplers.

One biome, the Ink Patches.

(btw the ink gives potion effects)

You can craft the majority of the items in the mod inside the biome.

![LOOK AT THE SKY.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ecb2f99932bd9ff3d43e57ac14fc3e249fa0286_0.webp)
